title: St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli

overview.short: Saint Francis Xavier Church is a Catholic parish church around Kethanahalli village in Dharmapuri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Saint Francis Xavier Church is a Catholic parish church around Kethanahalli village in Dharmapuri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The church is under the administration of Dharmapuri Diocese.

topPlaces.name: Kethanahalli, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Kethanahalli is a small village in Karimangalam block in Dharmapuri District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Kethanahalli Panchayath.

topPlaces.name: Savadiyur, Dharmapuri
topPlaces.description: Savadiyur is a village 5 km (3.1 mi) east of Palacode, Dharmapuri district, Tamil Nadu, India. This village comes under the Erraseegalahalli Gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Kariamangalam
topPlaces.description: Karimangalam is a town and taluk headquarters in Dharmapuri district in the Kongunadu region of Tamil Nadu. It is located at 20 km from Dharmapuri and 70 km from Salem.

topPlaces.name: Karimangalam taluk
topPlaces.description: Karimangalam taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. On 10 February 2016, Karimangalam taluk was formed by merging parts of Palacode and Harur taluks of Dharmapuri district.

topPlaces.name: Christ the King Church, Palacode
topPlaces.description: Jesus the King Church in Palacode is a Roman Catholic place of worship located in the Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a Catholic church parish under the administration of the Dharmapuri Diocese.

topPlaces.name: Palakkodu
topPlaces.description: Palacode (also known as Palakodu or Palacode) is a panchayat town in Dharmapuri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Palacode taluk
topPlaces.description: Palacode taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Palacode.

items.note: Kethanahalli is a small village in Karimangalam block in Dharmapuri District of Tamil Nadu State, India. It comes under Kethanahalli Panchayath.
Savadiyur is a village 5 km (3.1 mi) east of Palacode, Dharmapuri district, Tamil Nadu, India. This village comes under the Erraseegalahalli Gram panchayat.
Karimangalam is a town and taluk headquarters in Dharmapuri district in the Kongunadu region of Tamil Nadu. It is located at 20 km from Dharmapuri and 70 km from Salem.

Karimangalam taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. On 10 February 2016, Karimangalam taluk was formed by merging parts of Palacode and Harur taluks of Dharmapuri district.

Jesus the King Church in Palacode is a Roman Catholic place of worship located in the Dharmapuri district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is a Catholic church parish under the administration of the Dharmapuri Diocese.
Palacode (also known as Palakodu or Palacode) is a panchayat town in Dharmapuri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
Palacode taluk is a taluk in the Dharmapuri district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Palacode.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (108 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli?
faq.a: Stays in St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Francis Xavier Church, Kethanahalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kethanahalli, Dharmapuri, Savadiyur, Dharmapuri, Kariamangalam, Karimangalam taluk, Christ the King Church, Palacode.
